description_long: This is a discarded Coca-Cola can, cylindrical in shape with a bright red background and white branding. The can features the iconic Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed, with additional product information and a barcode on the back. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard ring pull tab, typical of carbonated beverage cans. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light, and there are no visible dents, rust, or damage marks. The can is likely made of lightweight aluminum, with an air-filled interior, and is sized to hold a standard beverage volume. The overall appearance is clean and intact, with all branding and text clearly legible.
description: A clean, glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, metallic top, and standard pull tab. The can is undamaged and features clear product labeling and a barcode.
description_view_0: Partial view of the can's side, showing the bold white 'Coke' text and part of the signature white wave design.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full Coca-Cola script logo and the classic white wave on a red background.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the Coca-Cola logo, product information, and a vertical black-and-white barcode.
description_view_3: Side view with the large 'Coke' text and a glimpse of the barcode and product details.
attribute_brand_logo: White Coca-Cola script logo in cursive font on a red background, with a distinctive white wave design.
attribute_label_text: Coke Coca-Cola trade-mark CARBONATED WATER SUGAR, CARAMEL COLOR PHOSPHORIC ACID, NATURAL FLAVORS, CAFFEINE. CANED UNDER AUTHORITY OF THE COCA-COLA COMPANY, ATLANTA, GEORGIA BY COCA-COLA BOTTLING CO. OF NEW YORK, INC. NEW YORK, N.Y. 12 FL OZ.
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the back label.
